info.name: Chatvolution — Admin internal multi-recipient mail
info.description:
POST ke Laravel admin (sama dipakai Nest LIVE_CHAT_ESCALATION_ADMIN_API_URL).

Set collection variable `admin_api_secret` = nilai MULTI_RECIPIENT_MAIL_API_SECRET di admin/.env

request.description: 401 = secret salah/kosong di server. 503 = MULTI_RECIPIENT_MAIL_API_SECRET tidak di-set di Laravel. 422 = validasi (email tidak valid, subjek/body kosong).
